untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a logistic regression model trained on lagged returns to generate probabilistic predictions of price direction. This is a machine learning model output that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicator library (which contains only technical indicators). The 'probability_threshold' of 0.55 and the binary classification mechanism require external model inference not available in the backtest engine's indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using returns as a proxy for direction, but this fundamentally misrepresents the signal which requires: (1) logistic regression model training on historical data, (2) probabilistic predictions from that trained model, and (3) dynamic threshold optimization. These capabilities are outside the scope of rule-based technical indicator conditions. A proper implementation would require integration of an ML model layer into the backtest engine.
